revision.comment: cleanup, moving {{[[Template:Birth year category header|Death year category header]]}} to the bottom, so that Commons links etc are beside Navseasoncats
revision.text: {{Wikisourcecat}}{{commons category}}{{Wikiquote|Category:1540 deaths}} {{Death year category header|154|0}}

revision.comment: 1 revision imported: Mass importing wikipedia categories, not taking histories because these are unused ones and it is kind of obvious where they came from
revision.text: {{Wikisourcecat}}{{commons category}}{{Wikiquote|Category:1540 deaths}} {{Death year category header|154|0}}

revision.comment: Bot: Reformatted page - moved categories, interwikis, DEFAULTSORT, and removed duplicates. [[{page.name}]]
Removing from [[Category:Refreshing categories falsely categorized as uncategorized]] on using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Text replacement - "[[Category:Supercategory 2]]" to ""
Bot: tidy & size tag (1 members)
Text replacement - "\{\{draft categories\|[^]]+\}\}" to "<noinclude>{{Draft categories|[^]]}}</noinclude>"
Imported from wikipedia at 2025-05-10 15:34:10
revision.text: {{Wikisourcecat}}{{commons category}}{{Wikiquote|Category:1540 deaths}} {{Death year category header|154|0}}

revision.comment: [[Project:History cleanup|Offloading history due to miraheze stability concerns]] many contributors, see [https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=1540_deaths here] for full history [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]]
